title: centella verticillata
intro: Centella verticillata, also known as Indian pennywort, is a perennial herbaceous plant native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. Centella verticillata is believed to provide various health benefits, such as improving cognitive function, reducing anxiety and stress, and enhancing skin health. The plant is commonly used to make herbal preparations, including teas, capsules, and topical creams, which can be used to treat a range of health conditions.
